name: Number of Divisors (Sieve)
description: Count the number of divisors for all integers from 1 to n using a sieve approach.
intuition: For each d from 1 to n, increment divisor count for all multiples of d. Similar to Sieve of Eratosthenes — O(n log n) total because sum of 1/d = O(log n). The number with most divisors in [1,n] is a highly composite number.
